task_completion.description: Verify the agent visited the required press freedom websites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Firefox browser windows displaying pages from rsf.org (Reporters Without Borders), freedomhouse.org, or cpj.org (Committee to Protect Journalists).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the specific bookmark folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Firefox bookmark folder named exactly 'Press Freedom Research' in the bookmarks toolbar, menu, or library.

task_completion.description: Verify at least five relevant pages were bookmarked in the folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the 'Press Freedom Research' bookmark folder showing a list of at least 5 saved web pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON output file was created in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'press_freedom_comparison.json' in the 'Documents' folder, visible in a file manager or open in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the required countries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file and ensure there is a root 'countries' object containing keys for 'norway', 'united_states', 'brazil', 'india', and 'china'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the required data fields for the countries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the JSON content to ensure the country objects contain the fields 'rsf_rank' (integer), 'freedom_house_score' (integer), 'freedom_house_status' (string), 'cpj_journalists_imprisoned' (integer), and 'summary' (string).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the web browser to gather information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active navigation in Firefox, with the required URLs in the address bar and page content loaded, rather than hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmarks were created using the browser's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmark star icon highlighted, or the bookmark manager/library window open, showing manual or GUI-driven bookmark creation.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON file was compiled using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, VS Code, nano, or vim) open with the JSON content being actively formatted and edited, rather than a single terminal command echoing a pre-generated string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required countries: norway, united_states, brazil, india, china. Required sources: rsf.org, freedomhouse.org, cpj.org. Bookmark folder name: 'Press Freedom Research'. Minimum bookmarks required: 5. Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/press_freedom_comparison.json.
